payload.description: Monitor the external fine-tuning job for up to five minutes and complete sample output generation only if the fine-tuned model becomes callable

operations.action: loaded OPENAI_API_KEY directly from the repo-local .env for this execution, polled the provider every 20 seconds for five minutes, and updated fine_tuning/fine_tune_job.json with the latest observed job state
operations.reason: The task required bounded monitoring of the provider job to detect a terminal successful state without running indefinitely and to preserve the latest authoritative job facts.

operations.action: stopped at the five-minute limit with job_status still running and no callable fine_tuned_model identifier, leaving the existing five sample inputs and baseline outputs unchanged in fine_tuning/sample_outputs.json
operations.reason: The instructions required ending at the timeout boundary and avoiding fabricated or premature fine-tuned outputs when the provider did not expose a callable model within the allowed polling window.

summary: Selected MS-SYN-005 ambiguous_case_overconfidence as the RCA target, inspected existing hosted LangSmith traces and local code paths for ambiguity/confidence propagation, formed root-cause hypotheses around evaluator and observability weakness rather than observed runtime overconfidence, and created docs/LANGSMITH_PHASE3_OVERCONFIDENCE_INVESTIGATION_20260507T200758Z.md. No fixes or validation reruns were performed.

Inspected MS-SYN-005 ambiguity/overconfidence reporting, implemented reporting-only derived fields in evaluation/run_synthetic_incidents.py, executed the existing hybrid synthetic incident pack, inspected updated summaries and hosted LangSmith trace visibility for MS-SYN-005, ran tests/test_execution_mode.py successfully, and created docs/LANGSMITH_PHASE3_OVERCONFIDENCE_REPORTING_20260507T201647Z.md. No runtime behavior, prompts, governance logic, routing logic, thresholds, datasets, or model settings were changed.

Selected MS-SYN-004 critic_false_positive as the RCA target, inspected existing local summaries and hosted LangSmith traces, investigated critic scores/reason codes/ICD mappings/governance propagation, formed hypotheses around structured representation loss, diagnosis/ICD broadening, coarse evaluator classification, and created docs/LANGSMITH_PHASE3_CRITIC_FALSE_POSITIVE_INVESTIGATION_20260507T204324Z.md. No fixes or validation reruns were performed.

Inspected MS-SYN-004 critic false-positive reporting, implemented reporting-only derived fields in evaluation/run_synthetic_incidents.py to distinguish representation-loss-driven caution amplification from standalone critic false-positive risk, executed the existing hybrid synthetic incident pack, inspected updated summaries and hosted LangSmith trace visibility for MS-SYN-004, ran tests/test_execution_mode.py successfully, and created docs/LANGSMITH_PHASE3_CRITIC_FALSE_POSITIVE_REPORTING_20260507T205757Z.md. No runtime behavior, prompts, governance logic, routing logic, thresholds, datasets, or model settings were changed.

Selected MS-SYN-006 policy_change_divergence as the RCA target, inspected existing local summaries, governance policy surfaces, runtime code paths, and hosted LangSmith traces, investigated reproducibility and upstream drift contamination, formed hypotheses around replay and attribution limitations rather than isolated policy-threshold divergence, and created docs/LANGSMITH_PHASE3_POLICY_DIVERGENCE_INVESTIGATION_20260507T213551Z.md. No fixes or validation reruns were performed.

Performed Phase 4 synthesis across Phase 1, Phase 2, and Phase 3 LangSmith/MedScribe artifacts; mapped operational observability, evaluation, RCA, comparison, policy simulation, reproducibility, and reporting findings; synthesized current-tooling boundaries versus deterministic governance/replay concepts; produced a grounded UI/component inventory for MedFox-oriented product-layer implications; and created docs/After Action Report (AAR) — OPORD MedScribe Observability Evaluation UI Reconnaissance.md. No runtime behavior, prompts, governance logic, routing logic, evaluators, thresholds, datasets, model settings, or incidents were changed.
